---
title: "Uplift modeling for an ads campaign"
subtitle: "Exploring the difference between propensity and uplift modeling using treatment effects in an ads campaign"
author: "Ebrahim Alhaddad"
date: "March 15, 2025"
image: uplift.png
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---


{{< embed uplift_summ.ipynb echo=true >}}
